R3 IDENTITY: verify emits id(x╠é) bound to the admitted snapshot it verified ÔÇö the transcript is addressed by the returned id, not by a re-read of the raw input

R3 NESTED: a two-face NESTED genesis in a resolver opts/config graph Ôćĺ the output is a projection over the VERIFIED face, never the unsigned re-read (round-31 P0-01/02/03; admitOpts is shallow, nested untrusted docs are deep-admitted once)

R3 ONE-CONTROL: admitOpts deep-admits EVERY nested opts/config DATA value once, so a resolver NOT individually patched (verifyEpochTransition) reads its nested doc ÔëĄ1 and cannot be shown a second face ÔÇö the whole nested-doc re-read class is closed at ONE boundary (round-31)
R3 RESOLVER: resolveKeys admits its genesis ONCE ÔÇö a two-face Proxy (signed A to verify, tampered B to the reducer) emits keys for the VERIFIED face or errors, NEVER the re-read face
